$schema: Golden test set for Climate RAG retrieval evaluation
description: Each query has annotated relevant chunk IDs from Qdrant. Used by tests/test_rag_evaluation.py for Tier 1 metrics (Hit@K, MRR, NDCG, Recall@K).

construction_guidelines.annotation_process: For each query, manually identify 2-5 relevant chunk IDs from Qdrant by reviewing chunk text content. Use Qdrant dashboard or scroll API.
construction_guidelines.key_numbers: For numerical coverage metric, annotate important numbers that should appear in RAG answers

queries.query: What is the global mean temperature anomaly for 2023 according to CMIP6 projections?
queries.notes: Should retrieve temperature (tas) chunks from CMIP6 dataset

queries.query: How does annual precipitation vary across Central Europe in the CRU dataset?
queries.notes: Should retrieve precipitation chunks with Central European coordinates

queries.query: What is the spatial resolution of E-OBS temperature data?
queries.notes: Should retrieve E-OBS metadata or temperature chunks mentioning resolution

queries.query: Compare temperature trends between CMIP6 SSP245 and SSP585 scenarios for Europe
queries.notes: Requires retrieving chunks from multiple scenarios — tests cross-scenario retrieval

queries.query: What precipitation datasets are available for the Czech Republic?
queries.notes: Should retrieve across multiple datasets, testing cross-dataset retrieval

queries.query: What is the maximum daily temperature recorded in the E-OBS dataset for summer 2022?
queries.notes: Temporal specificity test — needs chunks from the right time period

queries.query: Which climate hazards are covered in the D1.1 catalog?
queries.notes: Should retrieve Phase 0 metadata-only chunks from catalog entries

queries.query: What is the mean sea level pressure trend over the North Atlantic?
queries.notes: Tests retrieval of less common variables (psl)

queries.query: How many ensemble members does the CMIP6 temperature dataset include?
queries.notes: Metadata-level question — should find dataset description chunks

queries.query: What bias correction methods are applied to the climate projection data?
queries.notes: Abstract methodological query — tests retrieval beyond raw data chunks
